title: How to Log In to SiteFlow
metaTitle: How to Log In to SiteFlow
metaDescription: Log in to SiteFlow using OTP or QR code on the mobile app or web portal. Covers step-by-step login, OTP troubleshooting, and multi-company account selection.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
SiteFlow supports two login methods — OTP and QR Code. OTP is sent to the registered mobile number.

Login with OTP

  1. Open the app or go to https://web.siteflow.com/
  2. Enter your registered mobile number and tap Send OTP
  3. Enter the OTP received on your mobile number and tap Verify

Login with QR Code

  1. Open the SiteFlow app on your mobile
  2. On the web portal (https://web.siteflow.com/), a QR code will be displayed on the login screen
  3. Tap Scan QR in the app and scan the QR code shown on screen
  4. You are logged in on the web portal

If your account is linked to more than one company, you will be prompted to select a company after login.

If OTP Does Not Arrive

  • Wait 30 seconds, then tap Resend OTP
  • Check that you entered the correct mobile number
  • Ensure you have network connectivity
  • If the issue persists, contact your company Admin — they can verify that your mobile number is correctly registered in SiteFlow

If You Cannot Log In at All

Tips

  • OTP login works on both the mobile app and the web portal
  • QR login is the fastest way to get into the web portal if you already have the app open on your phone
  • Your login number must be the same number your Admin registered in SiteFlow — if it is wrong, only your Admin can correct it
  • If you are part of multiple companies, you will see a company selector after login — tap the correct one to proceed
